circular_title: MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26
circular_summary: LLP Form 11 annual return due date extended to July 15, 2026.
actions: Note for awareness — no immediate action required for Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. as the circular pertains to LLP annual filing and Rupee Interest Rate Derivatives, which do not directly apply to this client
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26
email_body:
{
  "subject": "MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26",
  "body": "Dear Sunita Rao, 

We are bringing to your attention the recent MCA notification regarding LLP annual filing deadline for FY 2025-26, as a matter of general awareness, although it does not directly apply to Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. as the circular pertains to LLP annual filing and Rupee Interest Rate Derivatives.

The required actions for your company are:
1. Note the notification for general awareness.
2. No immediate action is required.

There is no specific deadline for this notification. As the risk level is LOW, there is no penalty specified for non-compliance in this context.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require any clarification or assistance. We are here to support you in maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: Cross-check if client has any LLP investments or Rupee Interest Rate Derivatives exposure, review RBI guidelines for NBFCs
